descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 5-3 in Centennial Cup playoff game to lead series 3-2.
descriptionLong: Matt Hervey scored two goals as the Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Humboldt Broncos 5-3 in a Centennial Cup playoff game on Sunday night. The victory gave Richmond a 3-2 lead in the best-of-seven Western Canada Tier 2 junior final. Game six was scheduled in Richmond on April 28.

attribution.headline: Eyes go up 3-2 in Tier 2 tussle
